title: Better n' Stronger Bows
description: Want stronger bows in your game? This mod is just for you!
body:
Better N' Stronger Bows adds 5 new tiers of bows stronger than the vanilla bow\
_(Neoforge port coming soon)_\
The mod adds Copper, Iron, Gold, Diamond and Netherite tiers of bows.\
Below are the recipes for the bows along with technical information about the damage they deal.



![copper bow crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aad5f190112c46ea58bc07c858a1218aaadc93f6.png)\
The copper bow has a multiplier of 1.25\
It can kill an iron golem in 10 (fully charged) hits.




![Iron bow recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61d6259d7bde4e6fe8f1c9cbc321d261bf834301.png)\
The iron bow has a multiplier of 1.6\
It can kill an iron golem in 10 hits.\
It is more durable than a Copper bow




![golden bow crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a719a3119d0b742732ea53684d8506ee4efdd8df.png)\
The golden bow has a multiplier of 1.80\
It can kill an iron golem in 7 hits.\
It can break easily though.




![diamond bow recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e33ea1396f30e8666d67e42c7080146290feeb3b.png)\
The diamond bow has a multiplier of about 2\
It can kill an iron golem in 6 hits.




![Netherite bow crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2ea967416daf7424cb5e293d05ef23aaf09e7e9.png)\
The netherite bow has the highest multiplier\
It kills iron golems in just 4 hits.




If you have any questions or problems join my [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/Kn5XarnVd8).\
Also go there for any suggestions.
